title: Dark Colorful Ore UI
description: This OreUI inspired GUI re-texture brings Minecraft's interface to life. Featuring a premium gradient finish, fluid animations & colourful elements...🔥⛏️ Dark mode
body:
**Do you want an experience where you’re not greeted by the same grey interface every time you open a container?** If so,**Dark Colourful OreUI** is for you.

This pack changes practically every GUI and UI element in minecraft, featuring; Dark UI, fluid animations, polished, premium gradient finish, fresh boss bars and fresh shader panorama's for each version. Oh, and a whole load more that brings colour and life to Minecraft’s UI.🔥⛏️

🛠️For full features, the following mods are required:
  
💡Inspiration:
All GUIs are based off of the block that they correspond too

Original pack:[https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colouful-ore-ui](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colouful-ore-ui)


AR’s OreUI by amongstreality

Re-colourful Containers GUI + HUD by Vi_Tul
Colourful containers GUI by Kingybu

Ore UI-ify by BoardSodie

Unique Dark by amongstreality

Ingot UI by Zeit709

GUI Revision by Vixel

Colorful Containers OreUI (Never Released) by Springfall

OreUI by Mojang Studios
